location.descriptionAr: Unknown — requires official or field verification.

historicalSummary.en: Founded by the Fatimid vizier Tala'i ibn Ruzzik as a shrine intended to receive the head of Husayn, although the relic was ultimately housed elsewhere. It is one of the last major Fatimid mosques in Cairo.
historicalSummary.ar: يتطلب النص العربي الكامل مراجعة محرر متخصص قبل النشر العام.

architectureSummary.en: A raised street-front mosque with a hypostyle interior, arcaded facade, carved stone details, and a distinct relationship between platform, urban edge, and prayer space.
architectureSummary.ar: يتطلب النص العربي الكامل مراجعة محرر متخصص قبل النشر العام.

stories.summaryEn: The place belongs to Cairo's layered historic urban and cultural landscape; the record's public status is controlled by the inventory label.
stories.summaryAr: ينتمي المكان إلى المشهد العمراني والثقافي التاريخي متعدد الطبقات في القاهرة؛ وتحدد بطاقة الجرد وضعه العام.

visitorInformation.currentStatus: Unknown — requires official or field verification.

claims.textEn: The inventory identifies this record as Mosque of al-Salih Tala'i.
claims.textAr: يسجل الجرد هذا الموقع باسم جامع الصالح طلائع.

claims.textEn: Founded by the Fatimid vizier Tala'i ibn Ruzzik as a shrine intended to receive the head of Husayn, although the relic was ultimately housed elsewhere. It is one of the last major Fatimid mosques in Cairo.
claims.textAr: يتطلب النص العربي الكامل مراجعة محرر متخصص قبل النشر العام.

claims.textEn: A raised street-front mosque with a hypostyle interior, arcaded facade, carved stone details, and a distinct relationship between platform, urban edge, and prayer space.
claims.textAr: يتطلب النص العربي الكامل مراجعة محرر متخصص قبل النشر العام.

claims.textEn: Current visitor information is not asserted without a current official notice.
claims.textAr: لا تُثبت معلومات الزيارة الحالية دون إعلان رسمي حديث.
